name: mcp-server-webflow
description: Enables AI agents to interact with Webflow APIs.

rating.reason: The toolset has adequate documentation with clear tool names and basic functionality descriptions. However, there are significant inconsistencies in parameter documentation quality - some tools have comprehensive parameter descriptions while others lack essential details. The first tool's repetitive description text and several tools with minimal parameter descriptions (like 'delete_all_site_scripts' missing a description entirely) prevent a higher grade. The core API tools are reasonably documented, but the designer tools vary widely in documentation completeness.
